# Regex fixtures for skill: runtime-validation
# New visual-regression terms (this task) plus false-fire guards.
# MATCH: <prompt> — a trigger regex must match. NO_MATCH: must not.
NO_MATCH: tabulate the metrics for the quant engine
NO_MATCH: update the onboarding docs
NO_MATCH: refactor the screenspace allocator
MATCH: run a visual regression check
MATCH: compare the screenshot against the baseline
MATCH: check for layout regression on the dashboard
MATCH: validate the feature end to end
